items.titolo: Nike World Cup Uniforms Made of Recycled Textiles Won’t Solve Fashion Waste
items.descrizione: The activewear giant has used chemical recycling to make jersey for 16 teams competing in the tournament. But the technique is unlikely to help solve fashion’s waste issue.

items.titolo: The White House’s Aliens.gov Site Brags That ICE Arrested More Than 700 US Citizens
items.descrizione: The website, which compares human beings to extraterrestrials, touts arrest numbers from the Trump administration’s sweeping immigration crackdown. But some of its details are really out there.
